ModMetaData.name: RimImmortal - Cultivation Paths (Local)
ModMetaData.author: Local
ModMetaData.description:
Adds Orthodox and Demonic cultivation paths to RimImmortal.
After awakening a Spiritual Root, a cultivator must choose their path by studying one of two books before their first breakthrough:
ORTHODOX PATH — steady cultivation, inner peace, social respect. Slower energy gain, higher mental stability, respected by all.
DEMONIC PATH — volatile power, faster realm advancement. Corrupted qi warps the mind; others sense something wrong. Crimson eyes mark those who walk this road.
Each path shows a title in the health tab that reflects the cultivator's current realm (Qi Condensation → True Immortal for orthodox; Third Rate → Heavenly Demon for demonic).
